title: Literal Name
text: Literal Name Case-sensitive name of the parameter, up to 32 characters. All NLS characters are valid, but the first character must be a letter. Uniface maps its (uppercase) signature parameter name to this one. Description For C implementations only, if you create a new signature parameter, Uniface generates the default name ComponentName_ParameterName to ensure that it is unique. Applies To Signature Parameter Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
